title: 4" TPU Patch

title: Custom Woven Patches (2")
description: Woven Patches offer a modern alternative to traditional embroidered patches. Thinner thread enables a tighter weave to reproduce fine detail and small lettering, closer in appearance to printing. Woven patches are smooth, light weight and excellent options for decorating hats, bags, or apparel. Patch pricing includes a custom shape design and up to 7 thread colors. Standard merrowed border and heat seal backing included. For other patch backing options - see Product Options tab
descriptionHtml:
Woven Patches offer a modern alternative to traditional embroidered patches. Thinner thread enables a tighter weave to reproduce fine detail and small lettering, closer in appearance to printing. Woven patches are smooth, light weight and excellent options for decorating hats, bags, or apparel.

Patch pricing includes a custom shape design and up to 7 thread colors. Standard merrowed border and heat seal backing included.

For other patch backing options - see Product Options tab

title: Custom Woven Patches (4-1/2")
description: Woven Patches offer a modern alternative to traditional embroidered patches. Thinner thread enables a tighter weave to reproduce fine detail and small lettering, closer in appearance to printing. Woven patches are smooth, light weight and excellent options for decorating hats, bags, or apparel. Patch pricing includes a custom shape design and up to 7 thread colors. Standard merrowed border and heat seal backing included. For other patch backing options - see Product Options tab
descriptionHtml:
Woven Patches offer a modern alternative to traditional embroidered patches. Thinner thread enables a tighter weave to reproduce fine detail and small lettering, closer in appearance to printing. Woven patches are smooth, light weight and excellent options for decorating hats, bags, or apparel.

Patch pricing includes a custom shape design and up to 7 thread colors. Standard merrowed border and heat seal backing included.

title: Embroidered Applique - Breast Cancer Awareness Ribbon
description: Display that you think pink at Breast Cancer Awareness activities and events of all kinds with these ribbon patches. These 1 1/2" x 5/8" embroidered patches provides 100% thread coverage with a classic design, a white merrowed edge and an adhesive sticker backing for easy application to shirts, jackets, vests, pants, hats, bags, backpack and other gear. Keep the message going strong long after your event has ended. Other ribbon colors are also available.

title: Custom Pin Pointe Embroidered Patch (4-1/2")
description: Pin Pointe Patches combine the rich texture and weight of a traditional embroidered patch with the full color gradation and small detail capability of dye sublimated patches. These 100% embroidered patches can reproduce photographic details, gradient images and readable fonts as small as 5 point type. Perfect for decorating apparel, uniforms, hats, bags, merit badge programs and more. Heat seal backing included standard. For other backing options - see Product Options tab

Includes any thread coverage, merrowed patch border and heat seal backing standard! For other backing options - see Product Options tab

title: Custom Soft PVC Patch Labels (3")
description: Add some dimension to hats and apparel with custom PVC patches and labels. Thin enough to be sewn, durable and flexible enough to be machine washed, these non-toxic PVC decorations feature 2-Dimensional molded imprint with amazing small detail reproduction. Imprint includes a custom shape patch or label with up to 6 molded PVC colors. Standard backing included for sew on application. Other sizes, 3D designs, and other patch backing options are available, quoted upon request.
descriptionHtml:
Add some dimension to hats and apparel with custom PVC patches and labels. Thin enough to be sewn, durable and flexible enough to be machine washed, these non-toxic PVC decorations feature 2-Dimensional molded imprint with amazing small detail reproduction. Imprint includes a custom shape patch or label with up to 6 molded PVC colors.

Standard backing included for sew on application. Other sizes, 3D designs, and other patch backing options are available, quoted upon request.
